prompt.slashMenuTitle: Filter commands / skills / modes (↑↓ select, Enter confirm)
prompt.mentionMenuTitle: Choose reference type (↑↓ select, Enter to enter)
prompt.noteTagMenuTitle: Choose tag (↑↓ select, Enter to enter)
prompt.dropHint: Release to attach files to the conversation
prompt.dropUnsupported: Drag-and-drop upload is not supported on this page. Use it inside a task conversation.

profile.title: Profile
profile.passwordHint: At least 8 characters with letters and digits
profile.passwordRequirements: New password must be at least 8 characters with letters and digits
profile.passwordChanged: Password changed, please log in again

session.title: Session
session.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session? This action cannot be undone.
session.promptPlaceholder: Type your prompt, / for commands, @ for files. Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
session.resumePrompt: Recover session (select working directory, leave empty to reuse)
session.interruptedPrompt: {{count}} task(s) interrupted by server restart — click to resend

permission.title: Permission required
permission.defaultTitle: Agent wants to perform an action

session.autoCreateHint: Start with the default Agent. A session will be created after the first message.
session.quickSendPlaceholder: What do you want to do? Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line

settings.title: Agent Settings
settings.classifyHint: Configure the agent, model and prompt for automatic note tagging and title generation. Runs in a dedicated task session in the default workspace; open「Note classify task」in the sidebar to view each run.
settings.configHint: Manage Skills, Commands, and Rules scan path configuration. Scan directories are reloaded automatically after saving. Skills only apply to external SKILL.md files.
settings.taskHint: Configure automatic behavior when starting a task: auto-tag based on the description and generate a title with AI. Runs in a throwaway session and does not affect the main conversation.
settings.autoTagHint: When starting a task, the AI picks the best-matching tags from your predefined list based on the task description.
settings.autoTitleHint: When starting a task, the AI generates a short title from the prompt (replaces the default first-line truncation).
settings.predefinedTagsHint: The AI only picks from these tags. Add or remove freely.
settings.tagPromptHint: Placeholders: {{tags}} (predefined tags), {{prompt}} (task description). Leave blank for default.
settings.titlePromptHint: Placeholder: {{prompt}} (task description). Leave blank for default.
settings.noteClassifyIntervalHint: Wait at least this long after a note is created or updated before auto-classifying; skipped when no notes are pending
settings.envHint: One KEY=VALUE per line. These will be injected into the launched agent process. Use HTTPS_PROXY / HTTP_PROXY / NO_PROXY for proxy settings.
settings.resetToRegistryNotFound: This agent is not in the built-in registry, cannot reset
settings.agentRedownloaded: Updated and re-downloaded binary (v{{version}}), takes effect on next launch
settings.agentUpdateNotFound: This agent is not in the built-in registry, cannot update
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this agent configuration?
settings.hint: Add local ACP-compatible agents (Claude Code, CodeBuddy, Devin, etc.) here. Configurations are shared globally. Built-in agents are managed by config.yaml.
settings.validationError: Type, display name and command are required
settings.noteClassifyAgentHint: Auto-tag notes on create/edit using this agent; leave empty to use manual #tags only
settings.noteClassifyPromptHint: Supports {{content}} (note body) and {{existing_tags}} (existing tags); default output is a JSON object with tags and title
settings.noteMcpHint: Generate a token once so external clients and local agents can read notes via HTTP MCP. Token cannot be rotated.
settings.noteMcpAuthHint: External clients should send Authorization: Bearer <token>

system.title: System
system.hint: Reload the configuration and program so newly added Skills / Rules / Commands are picked up.
system.desktopHint: The desktop app will restart the backend process and refresh the page. In-progress tasks will be marked as interrupted and can be resumed from the task list.
system.browserHint: Hot-reloads scan directory configuration without restarting the process. Takes effect immediately only for new sessions; existing sessions must be recreated after reload to apply new rules.

configEditor.skillsDesc: Configure external Skills directories (agentskills.io spec: recursively scan subdirectories for SKILL.md)
configEditor.commandsDesc: Configure Slash Command directories (Claude Code spec: recursively scan *.md, supports subdirectories and symlinks)
configEditor.rulesDesc: Configure Rule scan paths (directories or single files, e.g. CLAUDE.md)
configEditor.subagentsDesc: Configure subagent scan directories (markdown files: frontmatter with name/description/model/tools, body as system_prompt; invoked by main agent via opennexus-subagent MCP)
configEditor.scanSkillsHint: Scan skill files in configured paths
configEditor.scanCommandsHint: Scan command files in configured paths
configEditor.saveSuccess: Configuration saved and scan directories auto-reloaded.
configEditor.scanRulesHint: Scan rule files in configured paths
configEditor.scanSubAgentsHint: Scan subagent definition files in configured paths
configEditor.mcpDesc: Configure globally shared MCP servers (standard mcpServers format), injected into all agent sessions. Saved changes take effect immediately for new sessions.
configEditor.mcpEditorHint: Edit mcpServers config (JSON). Entries without a type field default to stdio (command/args/env); http / sse use url/headers.
configEditor.mcpSaved: MCP configuration saved, takes effect for new sessions
configEditor.mcpInvalidJson: MCP configuration is not valid JSON

scheduledTask.title: Scheduled Tasks
scheduledTask.name: Name
scheduledTask.cronHint: min hour day month weekday (standard cron)
scheduledTask.probeHint: No model list yet. Enter manually or click Fetch Config
scheduledTask.timeoutHint: Execution exceeding this time will be marked as failed
scheduledTask.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this scheduled task? The associated session and messages will be deleted too.
scheduledTask.validationError: Please fill in all required fields
scheduledTask.workspaceHint: Task runs in the currently selected workspace

chat.noMessages: Start a conversation! Send a message to the Agent.
chat.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear the session history?
chat.restoreConfirm: Restore to this point? File changes after this message will be reverted and subsequent messages will be deleted.

file.title: File
file.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this file?

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.name: Name
workspace.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this workspace? All sessions in it will be deleted too. This action cannot be undone.

notes.title: Notes
notes.quickInputPlaceholder: #tag title or content, press Enter to create
notes.quickInputHint: Use #tag on first line (no space); Enter for newline, Shift+Enter to send
notes.classifyTaskHint: This is the automatic note classification and title task session. Each run appears as one execution block (view only).

documents.title: Documents
documents.deleteConfirm: Remove this folder binding? (Disk files will not be deleted)
documents.fileNotFound: File not found or has been deleted

debug.title: Debug
debug.disabledHint: ACP debug is disabled. Set debug.acp.enabled: true in config.yaml and restart.

docEditor.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?

docAI.title: AI Assistant
docAI.subtitle: Generate draw.io diagrams via chat
docAI.placeholder: Describe the diagram you want, e.g. "draw a user login flow"
docAI.renderFailed: Render failed. Retry or ask AI to regenerate.
docAI.waitingGenerate: Waiting for AI to generate the diagram…
docAI.welcome: 👋 I'm your doc diagram assistant. Tell me what to draw and I'll produce draw.io XML that can be inserted into the doc.

docMode.emptyHint: Pick a .md file from the "Documents" group in the left sidebar, or let AI generate a draw.io diagram in the chat.
docMode.chatEmptyHint: Describe the diagram you want in the input below (e.g. "draw a user login flow"). The generated draw.io diagram will appear in the doc on the right.
docMode.selectDocFirst: Please pick a document from the sidebar first

panel.requireSession: Create or select a task session first

fileBrowser.selectHint: Select a file from the sidebar file browser
